query:
ALTER TABLE tattoo_generations 
  ADD COLUMN deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN nickname VARCHAR(128) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN printImageUrl TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN printSpec VARCHAR(128) NULL DEFAULT NULL;
